current_run.description: Given an oracle f(x) on N qubits, find the secret index s (an integer from 0 to N-1) such that f(x) = ( (x_s AND x_{(s+1)%N}) XOR x_{(s+2)%N} ). Here x_k denotes the k-th bit of x (0-indexed, LSB is x_0). This problem involves a degree-2 boolean function whose active bits are cyclically shifted by the secret index.
